description: The CalculatorApp project is open in Android Studio. Address the following reported issues: fix the crashes occurring when using the % and +/- buttons, increase the calculation history display from 5 to 10 entries, and implement a visual indicator for stored memory values. Focus your investigation on the calculator engine (CalcEngine.kt) and UI controller (CalcActivity.kt). Login credentials: user 'ga', password 'password123'. Ensure the project compiles after all changes are implemented.
